seoTitle: O'Connell vs O'Reilly — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between O'Connell and O'Reilly. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in O'Connell and O'Reilly.
heading: O'Connell vs O'Reilly — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between O'Connell, Queensland and O'Reilly, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: O'Connell has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to O'Reilly (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is O'Connell or O'Reilly safer from flooding?
faq.answer: O'Connell has a flood risk score of 35/100, while O'Reilly scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: O'Connell scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. O'Reilly scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in O'Connell or O'Reilly?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. O'Connell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
